allow: Bash(powershell -Command "5001,5050,5100,5200,8000,8080,8888 | ForEach-Object { $port = $_ $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $conn.Connect\(''127.0.0.1'', $port\); ""$port IN USE"" } catch { ""$port FREE"" } finally { $conn.Dispose\(\) } }")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); vulns=d.get\('vulnerabilities',{}\); [print\(k, v['severity'], v.get\('fixAvailable'\)\) for k,v in vulns.items\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const p=l.packages; ['@xmldom/xmldom','postcss','esbuild','vite'].forEach\(n => { const k=Object.keys\(p\).find\(k=>k.endsWith\('/'+n\) && !k.includes\('node_modules/node_modules'\)\); if\(k\) console.log\(n, p[k].version\); }\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':', json.dumps\(v, indent=2\)\) for k,v in d.get\('mcpServers',{}\).items\(\) if 'pi' in k.lower\(\) or 'raspberry' in k.lower\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stale=[k for k,v in d['sources'].items\(\) if v.get\('required'\) and v.get\('stale'\)]; print\('OK - all required sources fresh' if not stale else f'STALE: {stale}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; runs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['workflow_runs']; [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r['conclusion'], r['created_at']\) for r in runs[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; runs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['workflow_runs']; [print\(r['name'], r['status'], r['conclusion'] or 'pending', r['created_at']\) for r in runs[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['workflow_runs'][0]; print\('ID:', r['id'], 'Status:', r['status'], 'Jobs URL:', r['jobs_url']\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; jobs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['jobs']; [print\(j['name'], j['status'], j['conclusion'] or 'running', j.get\('started_at',''\)\) for j in jobs]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; jobs=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['jobs']; [print\(j['name'], j['status'], j.get\('conclusion','running'\)\) for j in jobs]")
Bash(npx --yes esbuild --bundle=false src/components/Roster.jsx src/components/Swot.jsx src/components/Lineup.jsx src/components/Games.jsx src/components/Practice.jsx)
